overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character exploring a futuristic nightclub bathed in vibrant red and blue neon lighting. The character traverses multiple areas including the main bar, a cylindrical glass dance stage, upper lounge levels, and a main performance area with a live performer.

curved bar stools with red neon light strips along the base
large window showing nighttime cityscape outside
backlit shelves stocked with various bottles behind the bar

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the main bar area of a futuristic nightclub. Red neon lights illuminate the bar counter and stools, while patrons sit drinking and a bartender works behind the counter. The space is narrow with a view of the city through large windows.

agents.ego_description: approaching the cylindrical stage and observing the dancers inside

notable_agents.action: dancers performing inside the cylindrical glass stage
onlookers standing around the stage watching the performance

entered.detail: transparent cylindrical structure with dancers inside, lit with blue and pink lights

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the bar toward a prominent cylindrical glass stage where dancers perform under shifting colored lights. Several patrons stand around the stage watching the performance as the camera circles the structure.

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a narrower back corridor with hexagonal floor patterns, passing restroom doors and approaching a small arcade area with vintage game machines. The lighting here is dimmer with less neon presence.

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to the upper level while passing another character descending

large backlit wall poster with red monochrome imagery

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a staircase bathed in red light, passing a large illuminated wall poster. Another character descends the stairs in the opposite direction. The environment is narrow and enclosed with dramatic red lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level lounge with futuristic posters and seating

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper lounge area, observing the cyberpunk decor and other patrons

notable_agents.action: two individuals kneeling and interacting near the wall posters
person sitting on the lounge couch using a device

entered.detail: wall with large illuminated posters depicting figures in futuristic helmets
modern curved seating furniture in the lounge area
circular table with bottles and drinks on it

segments.scene_description: The character explores an upper level lounge featuring futuristic posters with helmeted figures, comfortable seating, and scattered papers on the floor. Two people interact near the posters while another sits on a couch. The space has a more intimate, VIP atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to main bar area on ground floor

events.description: descending stairs back to main floor and re-entering bar area

agents.ego_description: returning to the main floor and walking along the bar counter

notable_agents.action: patrons seated at the bar drinking and conversing

entered.detail: returning to the red neon illuminated bar counter area

segments.scene_description: The character descends back to the main floor and returns to the bar area, walking past patrons seated on the red neon stools. The environment returns to the vibrant neon atmosphere of the main club floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main performance stage with elevated platform and live performer

events.description: approaching main performance stage with elevated circular platform

agents.ego_description: approaching the main stage to watch the performer, stopping near the railing

notable_agents.action: performer on elevated stage platform singing or dancing
crowd members standing and watching the performance

entered.detail: elevated circular stage with blue and pink lighting and large screens
single champagne flute sitting on the railing in foreground

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main performance area featuring an elevated circular stage with a live performer illuminated by dramatic blue and pink lights. A champagne glass sits on the railing in the foreground as the camera focuses on the stage performance, concluding the exploration of the nightclub.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a futuristic nightclub, moving from the vibrant energy of the main bar through secluded corridors and upper lounges before returning to a grand performance stage. It begins along a narrow bar area illuminated by red neon and city views, before gliding toward a cylindrical glass stage where dancers perform under shifting colors. The camera then shifts into a dimmer back corridor with hexagonal floors and vintage arcade machines, ascending a red-lit staircase past an illuminated poster to reach an intimate upper-level lounge filled with futuristic art and VIP seating. After descending back to the neon-drenched main floor and passing the bar patrons once more, the movement finally culminates at an elevated circular stage where a live performer is bathed in dramatic blue and pink lights.
